interface.editor: Tinkercad 3D Design is a browser-based 3D modeling tool.
interface.main_tools: Use 'Group' (Ctrl+G) to combine shapes and 'Hole' to cut shapes out of others.

technical_constraints.workplane: The blue grid where you build. Use the 'W' key to move the workplane to any surface.
technical_constraints.scaling: Hold 'Shift' while resizing to maintain the proportions of the object.

tips: The 'Ruler' (L) is essential for precision and exact measurements.
Export as .STL for 3D printing or .OBJ for virtual reality/Unity.
